page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: SPAN410 or SPAN413.

Formerly: SPAN413.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 861

SPAN412 Women in the Middle Ages: Myths and Daily Life (3 Credits) Explores the role of women during the Middle Ages and analyzes the active participation of women in a society in which men's occupation was warfare. Also explores "feminine voices” and female representations in the literature of the times.
